steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The "if instead" clause is the key signal: if extinction happened before humans arrived, humans couldn't be responsible. The blank must express whether extinction and human arrival happened at the same time.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes causality, not simultaneity. ✗
  • Choice B: describes conflict or opposition. ✗
  • Choice C — 'coincided with': means occurred at the same time — if extinction coincided with human arrival, humans could be the cause; if it happened first, something else was. ✓
  • Choice D: describes transformation, not timing. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
